hadith_entries.text:
66. Narrated A'isha (may Allah be pleased with her): 'The
Prophet said: "Do good deeds properly, sincerely, and
moderately, and receive good news, because one's good deeds
alone will not make him enter Paradise." They asked: "Even
you Allah's Messenger"! He said: "Even myself, unless Allah
would grant me His Pardon and His Mercy." (Bukhari)
*
-
